property.source: OnTheMarket current asking-price snapshot + HM Land Registry PPD fallback
property.referencePeriod: Current 2026 OnTheMarket asking-price snapshot on 2026-03-31 for semi-detached homes with 3+ bedrooms and 2+ bathrooms; fallback uses HM Land Registry 12-month stratified transaction window 2025-03-31 to 2026-03-31 (with prior-year comparison window for trend proxy)

transport.source: TfL Journey Planner + OSRM (with station-profile fallback)
transport.referencePeriod: Snapshot query windows (peak/off-peak) with fallback where unavailable

schools.source: DfE GIAS open state-funded establishment exports + DfE Explore Education Statistics school performance data
schools.referencePeriod: Counts refreshed from GIAS open state-funded export dated 2026-03-31; primary quality from KS2 202425 Revised; secondary quality from KS4 202324 Final

pollution.source: London Datastore LAEI + DEFRA UK-AIR LAQM background maps

greenSpace.referencePeriod: Proxy baseline (single authoritative timestamp not yet wired)

crime.referencePeriod: Proxy composite (live monthly cross-check available separately)
